extension.summary: A Streamlined Utility Tool for Kodi
extension.description: No Bloatware, no Nonsense! Just Keep your Kodi sharp and clean with this utility tool... Now with a Custom Wizard. The "++" fork backs up and restores over Kodi's VFS, so Backup Location / Restore can point straight at a network share (nfs://, smb://) or any VFS path, not just local storage.
extension.news:
2026.06.30.0 - Dropbox large-file uploads are now resilient on slow connections (e.g. a Fire TV or Apple TV wifi uplink): smaller upload chunks, each chunk retried with backoff, and the session resumes from Dropbox's own offset instead of restarting the whole upload. Big backups (100 MB and up) that used to time out now complete. 2026.06.26.2 - Backup safety fixes: a failed Network/SMB/NFS copy now reports an error and never prunes your last good backup (the failed ship is no longer treated as success). - Keep-N rotation now orders backups by the in-name date stamp, not the raw filename, so a renamed/mixed-name backup set can never delete the newest one. - Dropbox: single-shot uploads stream from disk (no whole-file buffer); a broken download cleans up its partial temp file and creates the temp folder if missing. - Build no longer ships lint/cache cruft (.ruff_cache, __pycache__) inside the zip. 2026.06.26.1 - All-in-one backup tool: pick a Destination - Local, Network (SMB/NFS), or Dropbox. - Dropbox is one-tap: Settings -> Backup/Restore -> Destination = Dropbox -> Sign in, paste one code, done. No app to create, no keys to type (talks to the Dropbox REST API directly, no SDK). Backup uploads, Restore lists and pulls straight from Dropbox. - Keep-N rotation: set how many backups to keep; the oldest are pruned only AFTER a new backup lands, so a failed run never deletes your last good backup. 2026.06.26.0 - EZ Maintenance++ : forked from EZ Maintenance+ (aenema, peno). - Backup now writes through Kodi VFS: the zip is staged locally then copied to the Backup Location, so nfs:// / smb:// / any network share works (not just local paths). - Restore reads the same way: the zip list and the selected zip are pulled over VFS, so you can restore directly from a network share. 2026.04.05.0 - Updated for Kodi 22 2023.01.09.0 - Added AutoClean Cache functionality every x days at a given hour. - Backup always replaced the home folder reference in xml files with special://home Not all addons can handle this replace so it is now possible via a setting to disable this. - Backup Cancel didn't work. This is now fixed.
2023.01.01.0 - Fix a fix on 2022.12.28.0
2022.12.28.0 - Fix crash with full backup when there are foreign, like Hebrew, characters in xml files
2021.12.19.0 - Made kodi 19 (Matrix) compatible.
2021.11.03.0 - Fix Speedtest crash.
2020.12.19.1 - The plugin was also installed under Video add-ons. Now it only is in Program add-ons where it belongs - Clean removed some files created by Common plugin cache or StorageServer or script.common.plugin.cache at kodi startup. This resulted in breaking cache functionality of kodi - Upload kodi log file to pastebin didn't always work and the first bytes were binary characters - Made all decode calls UTF-8 - Improved ADVANCED SETTINGS(BUFFER SIZE) functionality
